title: OpenAI Token Usage Object Anatomy
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Token Optimization for Generative AI
description: Side-by-side anatomy of an OpenAI Chat Completions response with the usage fields connected to billing categories.

learningObjectives: Identify each field of the OpenAI usage object
Map each usage field to its billing category

pedagogical.teachingStrategy: Hover-driven labeling with side-by-side JSON and billing categories
keyQuestions: Which field maps to the Input billing category?
Where do reasoning_tokens appear in the cost breakdown?
commonMisconceptions: Thinking reasoning_tokens are billed separately from completion_tokens
Thinking total_tokens is a billable category
assessmentOpportunities: Match each field to its billing category by name
